---
title: "Resume"
---

## Professional Summary

Add a short summary of your actuarial experience, technical strengths, and
professional objectives.

## Education

Add your degrees, institutions, and relevant academic distinctions.

## Experience

Add your professional experience in reverse chronological order.

## Skills

Add actuarial, statistical, programming, and communication skills.

## Professional Development

Add actuarial examinations, certifications, memberships, and continuing
professional development activities.
